name: gmat-copilot
description: Draft GMAT mission scripts from natural language, review the diff, and apply to the active file — with lint and dry-run diagnostics inline.

commands.title: Draft a Mission from a Description…
Draft a Mission from the Selection

gmatCopilot.model.markdownDescription: The `provider:model` to generate with (e.g. `anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6`, `github:openai/gpt-4.1-mini`, `ollama:llama3`). There is **no default** — pick one explicitly with **GMAT Copilot: Select the Provider and Model…**. Credentials are read from the worker's environment, never stored here.

gmatCopilot.strict.markdownDescription: Reject a draft that does not lint clean (any error or warning). Turn off for permissive mode: the best-effort draft is offered with its diagnostics attached.

gmatCopilot.repair.markdownDescription: On a failing draft, feed the diagnostics back and regenerate up to this many times. `0` is a single pass.

gmatCopilot.dryRun.markdownDescription: After linting, load/run a draft in GMAT to catch runtime errors. Needs the worker's Python environment to have the `[gmat]` extra and a discoverable GMAT install.

gmatCopilot.server.pythonPath.markdownDescription: Path to a Python interpreter that has `gmat-copilot` installed. When set, the worker is launched as `<pythonPath> -m gmat_copilot.worker`, taking precedence over `#gmatCopilot.server.path#`. Point this at the virtual environment that holds your provider extras.

gmatCopilot.server.path.markdownDescription: Command used to launch the engine worker. Defaults to the `gmat-copilot-worker` console script provided by `pip install gmat-copilot`. Set an absolute path if it is not on your `PATH`. Ignored when `#gmatCopilot.server.pythonPath#` is set.

gmatCopilot.server.args.description: Extra command-line arguments passed to the worker on launch.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run check-types && npm run lint
